rules.message: Battery voltage (cells) exceeds the ESC's maximum rating.
Propellers are too large for this frame and will hit each other or the chassis.
GPS and complex features require an F7 Flight Controller; F4 is overloaded.
Total weight exceeds the lifting capacity of the motors (Needs at least 2:1 thrust ratio).

esc_burnout.hint: Check if your LiPo is a 6S but your ESC only supports 4S. Upgrade the ESC or use a smaller battery.

prop_strike.hint: Use smaller propellers, or upgrade to a larger frame (e.g., 7-inch).

cpu_overload.hint: Upgrade the Flight Controller (FC) to an F7 model to handle the extra processing.

cant_liftoff.hint: Use stronger motors, or remove heavy batteries/cameras to improve the thrust-to-weight ratio.

sluggish_racing.hint: Racing drones need at least a 4:1 thrust-to-weight ratio. Drop weight or get punchier motors.
